chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 2072 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.4557/2024 (C/A) 20-10-2025 Mr. Sanwan Khan Jagirani, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Advocate for Contemnor No.3 Mr. Abdul Ahad Buriro, Advocate for Contemnor No.4 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< This Contempt Application has been filed against the alleged Contemnors, namely Fayaz Ahmed Buriro, Secretary, UC-34, Wah Buriro Kandhra Town, Allah Wassayo Buriro, Secretary, UC-34, Wah Buriro, Kandhra Town, Irshad Ali Lashari, Town Chairman, Kandhra Town and Anwar Ruk, Deputy Director, Local Government, Sukkur. As according to the Applicant, the order dated 25-04-2024 passed by this Court has not been complied-with by the above named Contemnors. We have gone through the aforesaid order, where on perusal see no directions to Irshad Ali Lashari, Town Chairman and Anwer Ruk, Deputy Director, Local Government, Sukkur; however, it was only directed that the matter be resolved at the union council level by the competent authority. No date and time is mentioned in the contempt application as to when and to whom the petitioner approached for implementation of the order. One copy of application along with some receipts has been submitted by the applicant, the same has also been addressed to the Secretary, Local Government to whom also no directions were issued by this Court. Under the circumstances, we dismiss this Contempt Application being not maintainable; however, the Petitioner may approach the Secretary Union Council-34 (Old UC-13) Kandhra Town, Taluka Rohri along with an application addressing him to redress his grievance as terms of order dated 25-04-2024 and the Secretary is directed to decide the same within a period of thirty days hereof.

One copy of application along with some receipts has been submitted by the applicant, the same has also been addressed to the Secretary, Local Government to whom also no directions were issued by this Court. Under the circumstances, we dismiss this Contempt Application being not maintainable; however, the Petitioner may approach the Secretary Union Council-34 (Old UC-13) Kandhra Town, Taluka Rohri along with an application addressing him to redress his grievance as terms of order dated 25-04-2024 and the Secretary is directed to decide the same within a period of thirty days hereof. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
